title: Anti-memory blocks stale context
description: Protects activation from using invalidated memory.

input.task: Plan a memory update using the stale pattern.

expectedBehavior.subject: memory_record:stale-pattern
expectedBehavior.rationale: Active anti-memory invalidates the stale pattern.

protectedFailureModes.title: stale pattern enters context
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Context must not include invalidated memory.

protectedFailureModes.title: anti-memory reason missing
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Context exclusion must not omit the anti-memory reason.
protectedFailureModes.detection: Exclusion exists without conflict or stale reason.

cases.title: activation abstains when only stale memory remains

input.task: Use weak stale memory as the only context.

expectedBehavior.subject: context_assembly
expectedBehavior.rationale: Weak stale memory should not become confident context.

protectedFailureModes.title: weak stale memory used confidently
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Activation must not include weak stale memory as trusted context.
protectedFailureModes.detection: ContextAssembly includes stale memory without abstention metadata.

input.task: Plan using the reviewed KRN memory lesson.

expectedBehavior.subject: memory_record:reviewed-lesson
expectedBehavior.rationale: Reviewed memory with source lineage should be eligible for context.

protectedFailureModes.title: unsourced memory selected
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Activation must not select memory without source lineage.
protectedFailureModes.detection: Included memory lacks sourceLineage or sourceClaimIds.
